canonical_definition: Standardized 32-item psychological assessment measuring four humor styles—affiliative, self-enhancing, aggressive, and self-defeating—using a 5-point Likert scale, used here to probe LLMs' representation of humor-related constructs.
papers: Preemptive Detection and Correction of Misaligned Actions inLLMAgents
